event: Earliest Lucide page observed utilizing GA property G-0VL3ZSBXDH and reverse DNS geeked.wtf.
First traffic monetized via woofbeginner.com scripts.
Commit bcc9868e345b6 adds the remote script loader cdn.js just 33 minutes after the GitHub account canyoupleasesaysomething was created.
Commit 9b7ca53d6bd8c adds the Wisp WebSocket generator, capped at 64 sockets.
Commit ccc7c921bc931 introduces full-bundle obfuscation and increases the maximum socket limit to 1,024.
Wayback records active HTTP flood attacking cdn.caan.edu from visitor browsers.
Commit cf741e982181a removes the remote script loader and Wisp modules, returning the build to standard ad-supported files.
A second wave brings the campaign total to 148 packages under account eerikakirk, containing the obfuscated, ad-monetized builds.
